_comment: Kamino SOL (Wrapped SOL) reserve detail for flashloan execution. Fill in real addresses from Kamino API or on-chain data.
_deriveReserve: PDA of [lendingMarket, reserveLiquidityMint, 'reserve'] with Kamino program
_howToGetRealData: 2. Or fetch from Kamino API: GET https://api.kamino.finance/v2/reserves?mint=So11111111111111111111111111111111111111112
3. Or query on-chain: the reserve PDA is derived from [market, mint, 'reserve'] seeds
